title.en: Fastener Cost Analysis Template: Calculate True Cost of Fasteners
title.zh: 紧固件成本分析模板：计算紧固件真实成本
title.es: Plantilla de Análisis de Costos de Sujetadores: Calcule el Costo Real
title.ar: قالب تحليل تكلفة المثبتات: احسب التكلفة الحقيقية للمثبتات
title.fr: Modèle d'Analyse des Coûts des Fixations: Calculez le Vrai Coût
title.pt: Modelo de Análise de Custo de Fixadores: Calcule o Custo Real
title.ru: Шаблон Анализа Стоимости Крепежа: Рассчитайте Реальную Стоимость
title.ja: ファスナー原価分析テンプレート：ファスナーの本当のコストを計算
title.de: Fastener Kostenanalyse Vorlage: Wahre Kosten der Befestigungen Berechnen
title.hi: फास्टनर लागत विश्लेषण टेम्पलेट: फास्टनर की वास्तविक लागत की गणना करें

description.en: Fastener cost analysis template for buyers. Learn how to calculate true landed cost of fasteners including FOB, freight, duties, and handling to make better procurement decisions.
description.zh: 面向买家的紧固件成本分析模板。了解如何计算紧固件的真实到岸成本，包括FOB、运费、关税和处理费用，以做出更好的采购决策。
description.es: Plantilla de análisis de costos para compradores de sujetadores. Aprenda cómo calcular el costo real landed de sujetadores.
description.ar: قالب تحليل تكلفة المثبتات للمشترين. تعلم كيفية حساب التكلفة الحقيقية للمثبتات بما في ذلك FOB والشحن والرسوم الجمركية.
description.fr: Modèle d'analyse des coûts pour acheteurs de fixations. Apprenez à calculer le coût réel débarqué des fixations.
description.pt: Modelo de análise de custo para compradores de fixadores. Aprenda como calcular o custo real CIF de fixadores.
description.ru: Шаблон анализа стоимости для покупателей крепежа. Узнайте, как рассчитать реальную стоимость доставки крепежа.
description.ja: バイヤー向けファスナー原価分析テンプレート。FOB、送料、関税、手数料を含むファスナーの本当の CIF コストの計算方法を学びます。
description.de: Kostenanalyse Vorlage für Fastener Käufer. Erfahren Sie, wie Sie die wahren Bezugskosten inkl. FOB, Fracht und Zoll berechnen.
description.hi: फास्टनर खरीदारों के लिए लागत विश्लेषण टेम्पलेट। FOB, माल ढुलाई, शुल्क, और हैंडलिंग सहित फास्टनर की वास्तविक लैंडेड लागत की गणना करना सीखें।

keywords: fastener cost analysis, landed cost calculation, FOB cost, import cost calculation, fastener procurement, total cost of ownership

body.en:
Use this template to calculate true fastener cost:

1. PRODUCT COST (FOB China)
   Unit Price: $___/kg or $___/pc
   Order Quantity: ___ kg or pcs
   Subtotal: $___

2. PACKAGING
   Packaging Cost: $___
   Palletization: $___
   Subtotal: $___

3. DOMESTIC LOGISTICS (China)
   Trucking to Port: $___
   Port Handling: $___
   Subtotal: $___

4. OCEAN FREIGHT
   Ocean Freight: $___
   Insurance (1% CIF): $___
   Subtotal: $___

5. DESTINATION COSTS
   Port Handling: $___
   Customs Duty (___%): $___
   VAT (___%): $___
   Clearing Agent: $___
   Subtotal: $___

6. INLAND TRANSPORT
   Trucking to Warehouse: $___
   Customs Broker: $___
   Subtotal: $___

TOTAL LANDED COST: $___
Cost Per Unit: $___/kg or $___/pc

Compare suppliers using this matrix:

| Criteria | Supplier A | Supplier B | Supplier C |
|----------|------------|------------|------------|
| FOB Price | $___/kg | $___/kg | $___/kg |
| Lead Time | ___ weeks | ___ weeks | ___ weeks |
| MOQ | ___ MT | ___ MT | ___ MT |
| Quality Cert | | | |
| Payment Terms | | | |
| Landed Cost | $___/kg | $___/kg | $___/kg |
| Score (1-5) | | | |

Strategies to reduce fastener costs:

1. Container Optimization:
- Fill containers completely
- Mix product types
- Use optimal pallet sizes

2. Supplier Consolidation:
- Single supplier for multiple products
- Better pricing for combined volume
- Reduced logistics costs

3. Annual Commitments:
- Lock in pricing for year
- Guaranteed volume = better pricing
- Reduce administrative costs

4. Quality Focus:
- Right first time = no returns
- Proper specification = no over-specifying
- Test samples before bulk orders

cta.ja: カスタム分析をご 请求
